title: Division of the present 28 states of the country into six regions for the selection of six Ministers of the State Governments having administrative control of the departments of small scale industries

VI ;)1¥\0IIilt."' ~~ 31@1, ~~ ~~ ~.~.~ ['Ill. .r. l (3 )/2006 l!f!Qfll!fl~ ~] ~ m<f;R, 31'11: ~ 2418 Gl/2007 .MINISTRY OF SMALL SCALE INDUSTRIES NOJ'IFICATION New Delhi, the 14th May, 2007 S.O. 765(E).-ln exercise of the powers conferred by clause (c) of Sub-section (3) of Section 3 of the Micro, Small m:~d Medium Enterprises Development Act, 2006 (27 of2006), the Central Govermnent hereby divides the present 28 states of the country into six regions for the selection of six Ministers of the State Govermnents having administrative control of the department• of small scale industries or, as the case may be, micro, small and medium enterprises, to represent' each of those regions as ex-officio members of the National Board for Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises, for the purposes of the said Act, namely :- · TABLE Sl. No. Region States (1) (2) (3) I. I Haryana, Himachal Pradesh, Jammu and Kasl,unir, Punjab, Rajasthan 2. n Chhatisgarh, Uttaranchal, Uttar Pradesh, Madhya Pradesh 3. ill Bihar, Jharkhand, Orissa, Sikkim, West Bengal 4. N Goa, Gujarat, Maharashtra 5. v Andhra Pradesh, Karnataka, Kerala, Tamil Nadu 6. VI Arunachal Pradesh, Assam, Manipur, Meghalaya, Mizoram, Nagaland, Tripura' [F. No. 1(3)/2006-MSME Pol.] JAWHAR SIRCAR, Add!.
